metadata.description: Journal citation network for citation cartel detection (OpenAlex API, 2015-2022)
metadata.source: OpenAlex REST API + Clarivate JCR Suppression Lists
metadata.task: Classify journals as normal / self_citation / citation_stacking based on network features

examples.metadata_journal_name: The Journal of Clinical Endocrinology & Metabolism
Journal of Agricultural and Food Chemistry
